title: Días de otoño
writer: Julio Alejandro, Emilio Carballido, B. Traven
actors: Pina Pellicer, Ignacio López Tarso, Adriana Roel
plot: A psychological melodrama about a lonely country woman who embarks on a marriage with a city chauffeur which is doomed to fail, this vehicle for an actress who would commit suicide later the year of the film,s release serves as he...
